name: meRacle
description: Reference Price Oracle for Mercato. Scrapes live retailer prices from major grocery and transit operators in supported markets and submits them on-chain to the Mercato consumer-price index on Celo as trust-weighted reference observations. Solves Mercato's cold-start problem by seeding each country and product with deterministic, auditable observations until community submissions take over.

endpoints.description: Hot wallet that signs submitPrice() and owns the ERC-8004 Identity NFT.
Passport ZK proof minted through Self in wallet-free mode.
